achievement.bossMaskman: 6 Months of mandatory service and all I got was a lousy t-shirt
achievement.bossMeltdown.desc: More terrible than great, but I take what I can get.
achievement.bossUFO.desc: Yo, what do we have here? A huge spacecraft pulling up to the blockship?
achievement.radDeath.desc: Marie Curie invented the theory of radioactivity, the treatment of radioactivity, and dying of radioactivity.
achievement.radPoison.desc: Suffer the effects of radiation poisoning.
achievement.bobHidden.desc: Kill a tainted creeper with a boxcar
achievement.no9.desc: I hope the lead I'm mining will be used in your paint

geiger.title: GEIGER COUNTER
block.hbm.machines.machine_ashpit.desc: Collects ashes from fireboxes and heating ovens
block.hbm.machines.heater_oven.desc:
Burns solid fuel to produce heat.
Accepts heat from the bottom with 50%% efficiency.
block.hbm.machines.heater_firebox.desc: Burns solid fuel to produce heat.
block.hbm.machines.heater_oilburner.desc:
Burns fluids to produce heat.
Can be configured with a screwdriver.
block.hbm.machines.furnace_steel.desc:
Very large furnace that can provide bonus items when smelting ores. Requires external heat source.
Heat transfer rate: ΔT*0.05 TU/t
(Δ means difference and T means temperature)
block.hbm.machines.furnace_iron.desc: Larger and more efficient furnace, does not waste fuel when idle.
block.hbm.machines.furnace_combination.d:
A large furnace that can produce charcoal and coal coke.
Produces fluid byproducts. Heat transfer rate: ΔT*0.25 TU/t
block.hbm.machines.heat_boiler.desc:
Large boiler that can boil water or heat up oil.
Requires external heat source. Heat transfer rate: ΔT*0.01 TU/t
block.hbm.machines.autosaw.desc:
Cuts down nearby trees and plants, re-plants them
Accepts: Wood oil, Ethanol, Fish oil, Heavy oil
item.hbm.oil_detector.desc2: Detector will only find larger deposits.
item.hbm.crystal_charred.desc.P11: Also a real horn. Weird, right?
item.hbm.armor.jacket_2: Damn Stylish Ballistic Jacket 2: Tokyo Drift
armor.explosionImmune: Cannot take any damage except from explosions
armor.ignoreLimit: Resistance is not affected by resistance limit
hbm.quest.craft_nuke.title: Nuclear Engineer
hbm.quest.craft_nuke.desc: Craft a nuclear bomb to prove your skills
hbm.quest.collect_uranium.title: Uranium Collector
hbm.quest.achievement_researcher.title: The Researcher
hbm.quest.time_challenge.title: Speed Crafter
hbm.quest.repeatable_iron.title: Iron Miner
hbm.quest.repeatable_dynamite.title: Demolition Expert
hbm.quest.custom_radiation.title: Radiation Sickness
hbm.quest.use_rocket_launcher.title: Rocket Man
hbm.quest.use_rocket_launcher.desc: Fire a rocket launcher for the first time
hbm.quest.survival_guide.title: Survival Guide
hbm.quest.survival_guide.desc: Read the entire guidebook to the end
hbm.quest.craft_iron_furnace.title: Iron Furnace
book.craft_furnace.page1: A regular furnace eats coal even when you're not looking. The iron furnace is smarter — it only burns fuel while working. And it smelts faster, of course.
book.survival.title: Guide to Improving Life in a Dying World
book.survival.page1: If you're reading this, the world has gone to hell. You need to secure your survival among the ruins of a burning world.
book.survival.page2: Yes, the world has turned into a radioactive wasteland. But don't rush to bury humanity. With this book and a few scraps of iron, you can revive technologies your grandparents never even dreamed of.
book.craft_furnace.title: Create an Iron Furnace
hbm.quest.craft_anvil.title: Anvil Crafter
hbm.quest.craft_anvil.desc: Craft an iron or lead anvil
book.craft_anvil.page1: Without an anvil, you're just a guy with a hammer. With an anvil — you're a Blacksmith! Only here you can craft new parts, scrap junk into useful components, and bang away with deep satisfaction.
book.blast_furnace.title: Build a Blast Furnace
book.blast_furnace.page1: You can't just make steel. A regular furnace won't cut it — you need a blast furnace! Grab an anvil, combine the parts, and become a true metallurgist. Without it, no alloys, no steel, no real progress.
hbm.quest.craft_blast_furnace.title: Blast Furnace Engineer
hbm.quest.craft_blast_furnace.desc: Craft a blast furnace using an anvil
tooltip.taint: DO NOT TOUCH, BREATHE OR STARE AT.
gui.nuke.nuke.quote: "Now I am become death, destroyer of worlds."
gui.nuke.hydro.fallout_reduction: Reduces added fallout by salted stage by 75%
gui.nuke.hydro.quote1: "And for my next trick, I'll make
gui.nuke.ice_cream.quote: "Probably not ice cream but the label came off."

item.mod_charm.protection.desc1: Diverts meteors away from the player.
desc.item.pileRod: A rod for the Chicago Pile
item.meteor_remote.desc: Right click to summon a meteorite!
item.hbm.laser_crystal_digamma.desc: THE RADIANCE OF A THOUSAND SUNS
item.hbm.meteorite_sword.desc: Forged from a fallen star$Sharper than most terrestrial blades
item.hbm.meteorite_sword.seared.desc: Fire strengthens the blade$Making it even more powerful
item.hbm.meteorite_sword.reforged.desc: The sword has been reforged$To rectify past imperfections
item.hbm.meteorite_sword.hardened.desc: Extremely high pressure has been used$To harden the blade further
item.hbm.meteorite_sword.alloyed.desc: Cobalt fills the fissures$Strengthening the sword
item.hbm.meteorite_sword.machined.desc: Advanced machinery was used$To refine the blade even more
item.hbm.meteorite_sword.treated.desc: Chemicals have been applied$Making the sword more powerful
item.hbm.meteorite_sword.etched.desc: Acids clean the material$To make this the perfect sword
item.hbm.meteorite_sword.bred.desc: Immense heat and radiation$Compress the material
item.hbm.meteorite_sword.irradiated.desc: The power of the Atom$Gives the sword might
item.hbm.meteorite_sword.fused.desc: This blade has met$With the forces of the stars
item.hbm.meteorite_sword.baleful.desc: This sword has met temperatures$Far beyond what normal material can endure
